title: Artificial Intelligence
text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the field of building systems that can perform tasks that usually require human intelligence, such as reasoning, language understanding, image recognition, and decision making.

title: Machine Learning
text: Machine learning is a branch of AI where models learn patterns from data. Common types include supervised learning, unsupervised learning, and reinforcement learning.

title: Python
text: Python is a popular programming language for AI and machine learning because it is easy to read and has strong libraries such as NumPy, pandas, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch.

title: Neural Networks
text: Neural networks are machine learning models inspired by the human brain. They are widely used in deep learning for tasks like image classification, speech recognition, and natural language processing.

title: RAG
text: Retrieval-augmented generation, or RAG, improves language model answers by first retrieving relevant documents from a knowledge base and then using that context to generate a response.

title: Data Science
text: Data science combines statistics, programming, and domain knowledge to analyze data, build predictive models, and communicate insights. Python is one of the most widely used languages in data science.

title: Large Language Models
text: Large language models are trained on huge amounts of text data to understand and generate human-like language. They are used in chatbots, summarization, question answering, and coding assistants.

title: Supervised Learning
text: Supervised learning uses labeled data to train a model. Examples include predicting house prices, classifying emails as spam, and recognizing handwritten digits.

title: Unsupervised Learning
text: Unsupervised learning finds patterns in unlabeled data. Typical tasks include clustering similar items, reducing dimensions, and discovering hidden structure in datasets.

title: PyTorch
text: PyTorch is an open source deep learning framework used for building and training neural networks. It is popular in research and production because of its flexibility and strong Python support.
